enum_values.name: UseCompressionWhenSaving
enum_values.summary: Use compressed buffers when saving 3dm files (default is true).

enum_values.name: PdfOptionalContentGroups
enum_values.summary: How optional content should be included when exporting PDF files

enum_values.name: LeaveFloatingPanelsHiddenOnMac
enum_values.summary: Bool value used on Mac to satisfy a user request to hide floating stuff when a command starts and leave it hidden when the command ends. This is false by default. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-57945

enum_values.name: DisableFileWatchers
enum_values.summary: Disable file watchers, using to diagnose Mac Rhino mystery crashes https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-52805

enum_values.name: EnableCheckForUpdates
enum_values.summary: Auto check for update, enabled by default on Mac, does not show up in Windows https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-60427

enum_values.name: LeftJustifyNumericText
enum_values.summary: Mainly an issue on Windows; there are different numeric controls scattered across the product and no consistent text alignment. This is an attempt to provide a way to control the preferred alignment style.

enum_values.name: EnableWindowsGestures
enum_values.summary: https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-62173 Disable gestures for Windows views for a customer who was complaining when upgrading.

enum_values.name: MakeInteriorNgonVertexesSelectable
enum_values.summary: Set this to false if you only want boundary vertexes selectable when you run PointsOn. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-62140

enum_values.name: MacDisplayOldVersionAutosaveWarning
enum_values.summary: Set this to true if you want to be warned about autosave for old file versions on Mac. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-62359

enum_values.name: UseNewMissingFontUI
enum_values.summary: Set this to true if you want to be use the new missing font mapping UI. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-62642

enum_values.name: ExportDocumentUserText
enum_values.summary: Set to true to write document user text on Export and Copy/Paste. Set to false to not write document user text (default). https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-63589

enum_values.name: CommandsToIgnoreWhenAutoHidingToolPalettes
enum_values.summary: String list of command names to ignore when closing tool-palette on begin command. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-65131
